app.title: Social Support Application
app.subtitle: Apply for financial assistance — save anytime and continue later.

wizard.submitValidationFailed: The server could not accept this submission. Check that all fields match the requirements and try again.
wizard.subtitlePersonal: Please provide your basic personal details.
wizard.subtitleFamily: Tell us about your household and income.
wizard.subtitleSituation: Describe your situation in your own words.
wizard.privacyNotice: Your information is safe with us. We use bank-level encryption to protect your data and ensure your privacy.
wizard.submittedBody: We have received your application. Keep this reference number safe — you may need it when we contact you or if you follow up on your request.

validation.phone: Use a valid phone number (digits, spaces, or + allowed)
validation.lettersOnly: Use letters only (spaces between words are fine). Numbers and symbols are not allowed.
validation.nationalIdMin: National ID should be at least 4 characters
validation.nationalIdFormat: Use letters and numbers only (no spaces or symbols).

ai.editHint: Adjust the suggestion below, then save it to your answer.
ai.errorGeneric: We could not get a suggestion right now. Please try again.
ai.errorTimeout: The request took too long. Check your connection and try again.
ai.errorConfig: AI assistance is not configured on the server (set GROQ_API_KEY in .env.local and restart the dev server).
ai.errorInvalidKey: The Groq API key was rejected. Check that the key is correct and active, set GROQ_API_KEY in .env.local, then restart npm run dev.
ai.errorQuota: Groq returned a quota or limit error (often HTTP 429). Check your usage and limits in the Groq console, or wait and try again.
ai.errorRateLimit: Too many requests in a short time. Please wait a minute and try again.
